transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: First National Bank, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I want to dispute two charges. One for twenty-two pounds and one for sixty pounds. I don't recognise either.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can see those two charges. I'll need to put you on hold while I check the process for multiple disputes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for holding. I'm going to need to transfer you to our disputes team as they handle multiple-transaction cases.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Before you transfer me — will I lose my place in the queue?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: There might be a short wait. They'll have your details on the system. Transferring you now.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity — used account number only, no date of birth
transferred without raising any preliminary case or providing customer a reference number
did not advise customer of hold time before transfer
issue left entirely unresolved; no provisional action taken
